title: Optical Interconnect Design Engineer
description_text: We are seeking an Optical Interconnect Design Engineer. Required skills include silicon photonics, Verilog, and FPGA. Preferred: STA experience. This is a hybrid role.

We are seeking an Optical Interconnect Design Engineer.

Required skills include silicon photonics, Verilog, and FPGA.

Preferred: STA experience.

This is a hybrid role.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description_text: Join as a Machine Learning Engineer. Minimum qualifications: Python, machine learning, SQL. Nice to have: LLM experience. Remote friendly.
